docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BEST, DEBORAH DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEST, DEBORAH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 34 SIXTH STREET #234, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $1,350.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,350.00, LEASE FORFEITED

PLAINTIFF TO HAVE RESTITUTION OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 34 6TH ST. #234. LEASE FORFEITED. DEFENDANT TO PAY BACK RENT AND DAMAGES OF $1350.00 2-1-01 TO 4-30-01.WRIT TO ISSUE,UNLESS DEFENDANT MEETS FOLLOWING CONDITIONS:PAYMENT OF $800.00 BY 4-25-01 TO AGENT,PLUS $550 @ $25.00 5-1-01 AND ON 16TH OF MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID. $225 PAYABLE ON 16TH OF EATH MONTH. IF TERMS AND CONDTIONS MET,DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE TO BE FILED. EACH SIDE BEAR OWN COSTS AND FEES IF CONDITONS ARE MET.
